retry_reason: The lookup fails because the xfrm_state does not exist; this is a persistent condition based on the input parameters, not a transient error. Retrying with the same parameters is unlikely to succeed.
contract_summary: This function acquires a reference on an xfrm_state identified by the provided parameters (mark, daddr, spi, proto, family, netns). The caller must later release the reference using xfrm_state_put when done. The function performs validation of input parameters and may optionally obtain a network namespace reference; if the namespace lookup fails, it returns NULL with an appropriate error code. The returned xfrm_state pointer is only valid if non-NULL and carries a reference that must be released by the caller. The function does not require any locks to be held; it handles internal locking via xfrm_state_lookup. On error, the caller can inspect opts->error for details.
